title: Beef Russian Casserole
description: A hearty casserole dish featuring seared beef in a savory Russian-inspired sauce, topped with a crispy crust.
instructions: Season the beef with salt and pepper.
Sear the beef in a large pan over medium-high heat until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the beef to a plate and set aside.
In the same pan, add 2 tablespoons of butter and sauté the mixture from the gravy mix until fragrant.
Add the beef broth and heavy cream, whisking until smooth.
Return the beef to the pan and simmer until the sauce thickens, about 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, prepare the casserole by greasing a 9x13-inch baking dish with butter.
Arrange the beef in the prepared dish, then spoon the sauce over the top.
In a small bowl, mix the flour and a pinch of salt and pepper. Sprinkle the mixture evenly over the sauce.
Dot the top of the casserole with the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter.
Bake in the preheated oven until the crust is golden brown and the casserole is hot and bubbly, about 25-30 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
